name: v1.3.1-beta — Stability & Performance
body:
## v1.3.1-beta — Stability & Performance

This release fixes critical bugs with HDD capacity display and optimizes offload performance.

### Fixes
- **HDD Capacity Fix** — Resolved an overflow issue that caused large mechanical hard drives to show 0 bytes total capacity.
- **Copy Speed Optimization** — Throttled progress events and optimized database locking to prevent 'speed drops' during high-speed offloads.
- **Metadata Extraction** — Optimized camera metadata probing to avoid thread contention during the start of a job.

### New Features (from v1.3.0)
- **Rushes Log** — Professional shooting day reports in CSV, TSV, Excel, and PDF.
